fetched.text: Evidence first becomes an editable production system, not a static report.

browserProof.verificationSurface: Codex in-app Playwright browser in the primary task

correction.preFixResult: Desktop tools listed source summaries but search and exact fetch failed because the default persisted Workshop had no normalized chunks or claims.
correction.fix: The sanitized default Workshop now includes deterministic chunks and verified claims, legacy empty evidence is migrated, newer ingested evidence leads generation, and workshop_open returns the real root route.
verification: HTTP and in-app browser root inspection

limitations: This proves the installed read path in Codex desktop, not ChatGPT Work.

The already-running desktop plugin process returned its pre-refresh nested URL; the refreshed installed package and server tests return the root URL. A fresh task is required to inherit the refreshed process.
No plugin write tool or paid provider call was used.
The task ID and verification turn ID are not represented as the required Devpost /feedback Session ID.
